# `pheno-vibecoding-guard`

> Static guard rails for AI-assisted coding sessions. Catches hallucinated imports, missing type annotations, and prompt-injection-shaped comments.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): what / when / when not
- [SPEC](SPEC.md): rule registry + API surface + quickstart
- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): substrate scope + cross-references

## Reference

- [ADR-023 (substrate)](https://example.com/phenotype-apps/docs/adr/2026-06-15/ADR-023-agent-effort-governance.md): lib substrate placement rule
- [ADR-040 (coverage)](https://example.com/phenotype-apps/docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-040-test-coverage-gates-per-tier.md): 80% lib gate
- [Rule registry](SPEC.md#rule-registry): full rule list

## Releases

- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Keep a Changelog format
- [WORKLOG](WORKLOG.md): v2.1 schema (Date | Task ID | Layer | Action | Files | Notes | device)

## Source

- [Repo](https://github.com/KooshaPari/phenotype-apps/tree/main/pheno-vibecoding-guard): governance + meta-bundle path in the monorepo
- [src/](src/pheno_vibecoding_guard/): executable Python source

## Examples

- [quickstart](examples/quickstart.py): 5-line demo
